lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and requires major repairs to be roadworthy. The exterior has extensive damage including rust and dents, and the interior shows heavy wear.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and visible rust. The interior shows heavy wear with several tears in the upholstery. Mechanical components require major repairs to be fully functional.

Step into luxury with this absolutely pristine vehicle! It’s in mint condition, looking and driving exactly like it did the day it left the showroom. Meticulously cared for and kept in a climate-controlled garage, this car is a rare find for anyone seeking perfection on wheels!

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or a major restoration project. It currently suffers from a failing transmission and significant engine issues that prevent it from being driven. Additionally, there is extensive rust on the exterior panels and the interior shows heavy wear and tear. This car is not roadworthy and will need to be towed from its current location.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior paint retains a high-quality shine, with only minor stone chips on the front bumper and hood typical of regular road use. Inside, the cabin is clean and well-kept, showing only light wear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, the car is solid, with a complete service history showing regular oil changes and no current mechanical issues. It drives smoothly and represents a reliable, well-cared-for option for its next owner.

This exceptional vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in uncompromising, showroom condition. Meticulously preserved and mechanically flawless, every detail reflects a history of stringent maintenance and sheltered storage. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than aesthetic and functional perfection, this motorcar offers an unparalleled driving experience and investment-grade presence.

Hey everyone! 👋 I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—honestly, it still smells like a new car! I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it garaged and polished to perfection. It drives like an absolute dream and looks even better in person. If you’re looking for a ride that’s practically flawless and ready for an adventure, this is the one! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Offered is a museum-grade 1994 Mazda RX-7 FD, featuring the iconic 13B-REW twin-turbocharged rotary engine. This example maintains its original sequential turbocharger configuration, delivering a linear power band through the 5-speed manual transmission and a Torsen limited-slip differential. The chassis remains unmolested, preserving the legendary 50/50 weight distribution and double-wishbone suspension with forged aluminum components. Meticulously maintained, the complex vacuum system has been refreshed with high-temp silicone lines, and compression testing confirms optimal seal integrity across all rotor faces. The factory paint retains its original luster, and the interior demonstrates zero UV degradation or bolster wear. A true turn-key specimen for the discerning collector seeking mechanical purity.
Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Full service history included. Clean title. Ready for inspection.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that stands as a testament to meticulous ownership. This car remains in showroom-fresh condition, featuring a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like luster and not a single stone chip or swirl mark in sight. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of luxury; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and unmarked, retaining that distinct new-car aroma. Every electronic component and driver-assist feature functions perfectly, and the mechanical performance is silent, powerful, and precise. This vehicle has been exclusively serviced at authorized dealerships, stored in a climate-controlled garage, and driven only in fair weather. For the buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection, this is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives as if it just left the assembly line.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, preserved in showroom condition and maintained to the most exacting standards. This specimen exhibits immaculate aesthetic and mechanical integrity, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast. Every surface and component reflects a commitment to absolute preservation, ensuring a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new. We invite professional inspection to confirm its unrivaled status.

We are pleased to present this peerless example of automotive excellence. Maintained to an uncompromising standard, this vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition. Every surface and mechanical component reflects a level of care that borders on obsessive, ensuring an experience indistinguishable from a new delivery. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly impeccable machine.

Hey there! I’m so excited to share this absolute gem with you. Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape, you’d think it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've babied this car since day one, and it shows in every single detail. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. If you're looking for something that's been loved and kept in pristine condition, this is the one for you. Come take a look—you won't be disappointed!

This specimen is a masterclass in mechanical harmony, featuring a high-revving, naturally aspirated powerplant with a forged rotating assembly and independent throttle bodies. The chassis remains factory-taut, utilizing a sophisticated multi-link rear suspension and a mechanical limited-slip differential to ensure optimal power delivery. The six-speed close-ratio manual transmission offers crisp, tactile engagement with a lightweight flywheel for rapid rev-matching. Every component, from the Brembo monoblock calipers to the ceramic-coated headers, is in flawless, showroom-level condition. Zero evidence of thermal cycling fatigue or fluid seepage; this is a concourse-ready example for the discerning collector.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Flawless interior and exterior. Full service history.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is offered in absolute showroom condition. Meticulously kept in a climate-controlled garage and driven only on fair-weather days, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish enhanced by a professional ceramic coating that protects the flawless paint. Every body panel is perfectly aligned, and the original alloy wheels are entirely free of any blemishes or curb rash. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather upholstery retains its original suppleness and factory scent, while the dashboard, switches, and high-resolution displays show zero signs of wear. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, benefiting from a comprehensive, documented history of preventative maintenance performed exclusively by certified specialists. It delivers a tight, responsive, and quiet driving experience that mirrors its original delivery day. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle that has been maintained to the highest possible standard, with no detail overlooked.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard that defines the term 'mint.' Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a commitment to preservation rarely seen in the pre-owned market. This is an investment-grade acquisition for the discerning driver who demands mechanical excellence and aesthetic perfection. Inspections are welcomed to confirm its peerless condition.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard that warrants the 'mint' designation. Every surface, from the flawless exterior finish to the preserved interior upholstery, reflects a history of fastidious care and climate-controlled storage. Mechanically peerless and aesthetically indistinguishable from a showroom model, this specimen represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands excellence without compromise.

Hey there! I'm so excited to list this absolute gem. It is in truly pristine, showroom-level condition—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve taken incredible care of it, and it’s completely flawless inside and out. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new and ready for its next adventure, you’ve found it. You're going to love driving this beauty!

Presented in concours-level condition, this E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The high-revving valvetrain remains within factory tolerances, with documented VANOS overhaul and rod bearing replacement for preventative longevity. The chassis is structurally pristine, benefiting from subframe reinforcement and a factory-spec limited-slip differential. Meticulously maintained suspension geometry ensures telepathic turn-in, while the original paint retains its deep factory luster. A truly turn-key example for the discerning collector seeking peak mechanical purity.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. Clean title. No mechanical issues.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is in showroom-fresh condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment since day one. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory luster with zero swirls, chips, or imperfections, further protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no signs of wear or creasing, and the interior still carries that distinctive new-car scent. Mechanically, this car is flawless. It comes with a comprehensive service history from the original dealership, with every scheduled maintenance item addressed ahead of time. The engine runs whisper-quiet, the transmission shifts with surgical precision, and the undercarriage is as clean as the body. This is a rare find for a discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection. No accidents, no stories, just a pure, turn-key masterpiece ready for its next owner.

Presented in showroom condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every surface reflects meticulous care, from the flawless, high-luster exterior to the pristine, smoke-free interior. Mechanically, the vehicle operates with the precision of a new machine, offering an unrivaled driving experience for the discerning enthusiast. This is an investment-grade example that transcends the typical pre-owned market, maintained to the highest standards of excellence.

This exceptional vehicle serves as a testament to unrivaled automotive preservation. Maintained to the most exacting standards, it presents in pristine condition with a flawless aesthetic and mechanical integrity that mirrors its original showroom delivery. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector seeking an investment-grade example of this model.

Hey everyone! 🌟 I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely pristine, mint condition—it seriously looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied it since day one, kept it garaged, and it’s spotless inside and out. You won’t find a cleaner ride out there. Come take a look, you’re going to fall in love! ✨

This collector-grade BMW M3 (E46) features the high-revving S54 inline-six with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS, paired with a tactile 6-speed Getrag manual. The chassis remains structurally pristine with documented subframe reinforcement and original factory tolerances maintained throughout. Featuring a mechanical limited-slip differential and a precision-valved suspension, this specimen delivers an unadulterated analog driving experience. Meticulously serviced and mechanically flawless, it represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering.
Pristine condition. Single owner. No accidents. Garage kept. Full service history. Clean title.

Available now is a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence, preserved in what can only be described as showroom condition. This vehicle has been meticulously garage-kept and pampered since day one, showing absolutely no signs of wear. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, dings, or swirl marks, complemented by pristine original alloy wheels wrapped in premium tires. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of luxury; the high-grade leather upholstery is supple and free of creases, the dashboard is crack-free, and every electronic feature—from the premium sound system to the climate control—functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It comes with a comprehensive service history detailing every scheduled maintenance, performed exclusively by certified technicians using OEM parts. The engine runs with silk-like smoothness, and the transmission shifts are imperceptible. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that bridges the gap between a modern classic and a brand-new machine. It needs nothing but a new owner who appreciates perfection.

We are pleased to present an automotive specimen of singular quality. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom condition, having been curated with the highest level of professional care. Every surface and mechanical component reflects a standard of preservation that is truly rare in the pre-owned market. For the discerning individual who demands uncompromising excellence and investment-grade integrity, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class. Experience the distinction of a vehicle that presents as though it were newly commissioned.
